title: Form to Collect Daily Availability and Integration into Workload Management

posts.author: NW90 (Nick Westphal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I’ve set up a board for Workload Management, and I want to display the workload/availability for each individual team member. However, many of our team members are freelancers with varying availability from month to month.

What would be the best way to track and integrate the daily availability of each team member/freelancer into the Workload Management board? Ideally, I’d like to collect this information at the beginning of each month.

Has anyone faced a similar challenge, or are there any recommended tools or automations within Monday.com that could help streamline this process?

Thanks in advance! Cheers!

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Nick,

Welcome to the Monday community!

You could set up a system where freelancers update their working status at the beginning of each month reflecting their availability for that period.

It would allow visibility on who is off or available for task assignments
